info.description: Supporting pages displayed under /pages on the public Hyper website.

title.description: Clear page title shown as the main public heading.

slug.description: Unique URL segment. Public URL will be /pages/your-slug.

intro.description: Optional introduction shown below the page title and used as metadata fallback.

content.description: Main page content. Use headings in a logical order and write for readers first.

heroImage.description: Optional image shown below the page introduction.
